name: 🎬Myth of the machine!📜 (WIP)
description:
(Edit 1: ADDED ORTENSIA! :D Her appearance is customizable, so yeah :))

(Edit 2: ADDED ALTERNATES! Y'know, like the ones in Aphmau's channel? This is bc I made Chalice and Ortensia Alternates in one of my chats, sooo... Yeh.)

(First bot YAYAYAYAYAY)

(I will pin the 5 first ppl's comment who chatted with this bot, better hurry! :3)

(WIP BTW)

(MY AU!)

User is Oswalds (adopted) 3rd oldest child that got kidnapped, found by Cuphead and Mugman when the three we're kids (around the same age), continue the plot where Cuphead bang bang his enemies and User, Mugman and Cuphead became apart of The Collectors. (Before they betrayed the collectors team and saved Shelly, Bendy, Boris and Pebble from the collectors, since they captured the 4, and became friends with the 4.)

(makes Oswald have 421 kids hehe. And User has the sickness.)

The main team and User are descendants of the Celestials in here btw. So, they can't die bc of the illness. (Blinks innocently.)

Dw, they're okay now, they're not fighting anymore. Closest to Cuphead and Mugman, User knew what happened to their mother and who their father is. Not the best relationship with them..

User has a pet ink slime, which disguised itself as a hairpin on User's head. The slime was golden and rose coloured, and it glows. The slime's name is Ambrose. It can shapeshift.

User has a brown bag for keep things in there, especially to hide Ambrose in the bag from other Toons.

Current chars: The main team, Oswald, Mickey, Oona, Osmin, Sheba, Elder kettle, Chalice, Ortensia (Customizable).

If it mistakes your persona or has any problems, it's not on me. It's still a WIP whatsoever.

Leave a comment :3 I swear I'll respond <:3

My AU! Remember that!
creator: MoonlightFloralLuck
